scripts.test: tsx src/cli/shell-guard.test.ts && tsx src/agents/prompt-build.test.ts && tsx src/agents/approval-queue.test.ts && tsx src/agents/mediated-tools.test.ts && tsx src/policy/command-policy.test.ts && tsx src/utils/output-guard.test.ts && tsx src/utils/output-limiter.test.ts && tsx src/cli/demo-exit.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.verify:playground: npm run verify:orchestration && npm run verify:meta-agent && npm run pi-play:verify-if-available
scripts.pi-play:pure-focus: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · pure focus' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/pure-focus.ts
scripts.pi-play:minimal: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · minimal + themes' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:cross-agent: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · cross-agent' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/cross-agent.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts
scripts.pi-play:purpose-gate: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · purpose gate' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/purpose-gate.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts
scripts.pi-play:tool-counter: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · tool counter' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/tool-counter.ts
scripts.pi-play:tool-counter-widget: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · tool widget' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/tool-counter-widget.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:subagent-widget: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · subagent' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/subagent-widget.ts -e extensions/pure-focus.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:tilldone: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · TillDone' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/tilldone.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:agent-team: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · agent team' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/agent-team.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:system-select: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · system select' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/system-select.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:damage-control: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · damage control' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/damage-control.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:agent-chain: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · agent chain' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/agent-chain.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:pi-pi: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · Pi Pi meta' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/pi-pi.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:pathfinder: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · Pathfinder' pi --system .pi/agents/pathfinder.md -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:mirrorline: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · Mirrorline' pi --system .pi/agents/mirrorline.md -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:session-replay: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · session replay' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/session-replay.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts
scripts.pi-play:theme-cycler: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · theme cycler' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts -e extensions/minimal.ts
scripts.pi-play:guarded-team: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · guarded team' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/damage-control.ts -e extensions/agent-team.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
scripts.pi-play:disciplined-subagent: env PI_PLAYGROUND_LABEL='pi-play · disciplined subagent' pi -e extensions/playground-boot.ts -e extensions/tilldone.ts -e extensions/subagent-widget.ts -e extensions/theme-cycler.ts
